message: Ha! I ended up falling asleep because it felt so good! Where am I? Inside a prison.
Has Eddie been calling from inside prison until now?
Hey hey! It's Lovely Eddie! Yo, brother, come join us! Let's trip and feel good!
It's getting more and more dangerous.
I’m feeling totally crazy right now, come join me! I’ll be waiting, baby!
Even if you say come, where am I supposed to go?
Hello! It's me, Eddie. My head feels blown and I'm in a super wild mood, okay?
Sorry, I dialed the wrong number.
The phone number you called is currently in use.
Where on earth was I trying to call?
Damn, I dialed the wrong number.
Hello, it's Yama-chan. Thank you for your call. I'm moving now because of Dad's transfer. Thanks for everything, bye bye.
This is the end of Yama-chan's program.
Hello, it's Yama-chan. Thank you for your call. I baked cookies today. Enjoy the delicious cookies!
Hello, it's Yama-chan. Thank you for your call. I played doctor at Sumio-kun's house today, hehe.
I can't understand what today's dolls are thinking.
Hello, I'm Yama-chan. Thanks for the call. Today I played house with my twin sister, hee hee.
Tomorrow's weather is a terrible cloudy sky! It's supposed to be covered with heavy, dark clouds, scary, huh.
This should be the weather forecast dial, right?
Tomorrow's weather is going to be super clear! I feel like flying in the bright sky! Spring is just around the corner.
This is definitely the weather forecast dial, right?
Tomorrow's weather is a hurricane followed by heavy snow!? Unbelievable! There’s no way the weather can be that crazy.
I mistakenly called a crazy weather forecast dial.
New York's weather tomorrow will be sunny then cloudy.
It'll still be cold at night, so please be careful.
Did I call the weather forecast dial?
Mighty Yoshihara's next work is Cutie Hatch! It starts from next week, so make sure to tune in!
Cutie Hatch? I wonder what kind of story it will be.
Thanks to you, I, Mighty Yoshihara, was able to get promoted. This is a goodbye for now. Adios, amigo!
So Mighty Yoshihara was from Mexico?
Ah, an alien right in front of me!? How do I fight? Punch is 4, kick is 8, push 0 for the laser gun!
Hmm, which one should I push?
Wow, big hit! Seems like this guy was just a reconnaissance unit. See you next time, buddy!
Ooooh noooo! I got tripped and slammed to the floor! Next time, give me proper instructions, partner!
Hmph, just take damage on your own.
Yay! The enemy burned up and turned white. I've never seen such a creature, let's do our best next time too, partner!
I was waiting for your help. I'm Mighty Yoshihara, the captain of the Earth Defense Force. You should fight aliens with me.
I accidentally pushed the adventure dial for boys.
She seems pretty mad. What should I do?
Hmph. I didn't know you were in cahoots with Cindy.
That's right. You were the one who took Cindy to that shady kid's place, weren't you?
Wait a minute. I just happened to be there, and I don't know anything about Cindy and Tim.
I have no business with you and I don't want to talk to you. Don't ever call me again.
Boss, you haven't apologized to Gloria yet.
I didn't have that kind of time. I was just talked at until it ended.
I was told not to call again.
Well, there's no helping it in that case.
I am currently out. Please call again later.
She must be using the pretense of being out.
Is she in a daze unable to answer, or is Cindy going to apologize for the job she messed up?
She is surely wandering around looking for Cindy.
A voicemail that can't even take messages is unbelievable.
I tried calling Ginny, but no one answered.
